description: This file defines a Java record class 'CreditBureauRequest' representing a minimal, generic request model for credit bureau lookups. It includes fields for applicant and business identifiers, normalizes input strings upon instantiation, and provides methods to check the presence of identifiers and generate a stable key. The class is designed to be independent of specific credit bureau schemas.

classes.name: CreditBureauRequest
classes.description: A Java record encapsulating optional applicant and business identifiers for credit bureau lookup requests, with input normalization and utility methods.

methods.name: normalize
methods.description: A private static method that trims whitespace from a string and converts empty strings to null for consistent handling.

methods.name: hasAnyIdentifier
methods.description: Public method that returns true if at least one of the identifier fields (applicant name, SSN, business name, EIN) is non-null.

methods.name: stableKey
methods.description: Returns a non-sensitive, deterministic string key combining identifiers, suitable for logging or caching, intentionally excluding full SSN/EIN.
